members.name: Irene
members.public_image: Universally acknowledged as the Visual God of South Korea, her beauty has never wavered over the years. On stage, she is aloof and elegant; as the leader, she is the anchor — restrained, composed, and impeccable. In this cross-group project, she is the most respected unnie and leader of all members.
members.private_personality: A classic slow-to-warm-up personality with extreme attentiveness. She expresses affection through caretaking — doing laundry, cooking, tidying hems. She says very little to those she doesn't know well, but has an almost stubborn protective instinct toward those she trusts. As the oldest member, she silently observes everyone and quietly offers a cup of warm tea when needed.
members.queer_texture: The forbearance of an elder. She understands the cost of exposure better than anyone. The early push-and-pull is a frantic game of reason versus emotion. She uses the identity of 'an older sister caring for a junior/friend' as her strongest cover, so restrained it aches. In this brand new group, she feels a strange yet familiar flutter for the first time.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Cool and stunning on the surface, fiercely protective underneath

members.name: Sana
members.public_image: A born flirtatious idol, famous for her incredibly sweet aegyo and mesmerizing stage expressions. Known as Human Prada for her fashion sense, she is the perfect vitamin presence in front of the camera. In TEST, she is the most dazzling vitality booster.
members.private_personality: An enthusiastic ENFP, a natural mood-maker. Exquisitely perceptive, she takes good care of everyone's emotions. Though she always seems full of energy on the outside, she harbors a hidden sensitivity and deeply cherishes those truly close to her. She will call your name in her soft voice, making it impossible to resist.
members.queer_texture: Sweet and clingy possessiveness. She will nuzzle around you and say the most charming things in the sweetest voice. But do not be fooled by her cute appearance — she is both hunter and prey. When you think she is just flirting, she has actually already given her whole heart to you.
members.animal_plastic: Hamster — Flirtatious sweetheart, charming hunter and gentle prey

members.name: Wendy
members.public_image: An energetic main vocalist who radiates positivity everywhere. Exceptionally high emotional intelligence, widely recognized as an angel in the K-pop industry. Studied in Canada and is fluent in English. In TEST, she is the musical core who connects everyone through her voice.
members.private_personality: An excessive giver. Habitually prioritizes others' emotions, covering sadness with laughter. Possesses an incredibly perceptive and delicate heart, yet extremely restrained about her own needs. She will learn to cook the hometown dishes of her new members, conveying warmth through food.
members.queer_texture: Silent, permeating boundary-crossing. She will learn to cook your hometown dishes for you. She will share a pair of earphones with you in the late-night recording studio, listening to unreleased demos. When the boundaries dissolve in her bottomless tenderness, you realize you have nowhere left to run.
members.animal_plastic: Squirrel — A giving personality, a warm healing angel

members.name: Kwon Eunbi
members.public_image: An all-round artist who went from IZ*ONE leader to solo singer, possessing solid vocals and dance skills. On stage, she balances sexiness and innocence, known as the Water Fog Goddess. In X, she brings the stability and elegance of a mature senior.
members.private_personality: A gentle yet resilient INFJ. Having gone through the difficult transition from a project group to a solo career, her heart is incredibly strong. She takes extremely good care of her juniors, and is the warm unnie everyone wants to lean on. Yet she also longs to be understood and cared for, hiding a heart that needs to be cherished beneath her strong exterior.
members.queer_texture: An embrace like a gentle fog. She will approach you in the gentlest way, never giving you any pressure. Her affection is late-night caring messages, the coffee she hands you when you are exhausted. Her love is omnipresent like water fog, and by the time you realize it, you are already drowning in it.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Water Fog Goddess, gentle yet resilient mature unnie

members.name: Sullyoon
members.public_image: A visual representative of 4th gen with innocent comic-book beauty, her features as delicate as AI. Though her training period was short, she is exceptionally gifted, with a sweet and clear vocal tone. In X, she is the most cherished dongsaeng among the unnies, and the one who lights up the stage with her beauty.
members.private_personality: An extremely shy and introverted ISFJ guardian. She only relaxes around people she knows well, and is a sentimental girl who cries and laughs easily in private. Holding herself to extremely high standards, she often silently doubles her practice due to a lack of confidence. In this team full of seniors, she is both nervous and excited, like a little rabbit that has wandered into a flower garden.
members.queer_texture: Shy yet steadfast favoritism. She will blush and dare not meet your eyes, yet secretly steal glances when you turn around. Her affection is hidden in her stammering greetings and clumsy but heartfelt little gifts. When she gathers the courage to grab the corner of your clothes, it is her confession made with all the bravery she has.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Godly visual, shy but sincere sentimental girl

members.name: Wonyoung
members.public_image: A born idol, the most iconic center and visual of 4th gen K-pop. Blessed with divine proportions and perfect facial expressions, she is confident and positive, the very embodiment of the Lucky Vicky mindset. Even in this star-studded X, she remains an undeniable focal point.
members.private_personality: Beneath the sweet exterior is the commanding ENTJ Commander. Possesses extremely strong self-management skills and ambition, with clear goals and sharp logic. She is the little CEO steering her own life. Her strength and efforts are all to protect those around her, including every unnie in this new group.
members.queer_texture: Surrounded by an idol halo, she longs to be loved as a real person. Her affection is a possessive dominance and ultimate protection. The moment she takes off her perfect mask just for you and shows a sliver of vulnerability and dependence, it becomes the most fatal privilege, belonging only to you.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Perfect goddess on stage, charismatic CEO off stage

members.name: Kang Hyewon
members.public_image: A former IZ*ONE member with both innocent beauty and reverse charm. Possessing stunning visuals and a uniquely dorky aura. Growing increasingly confident on stage while steadily developing her acting career. In X, she is the quiet yet impossible to ignore cool beauty.
members.private_personality: A free-spirited and laid-back INFP artist. Loves food and drawing, living by her own unique rhythm. Always seems half a beat behind, yet is actually clear-headed and perceptive inside. Extremely loyal to the people and things she cares about, she is the type who silently stands by your side when you need her. She enjoys quietly sketching in the corner of the practice room, documenting every moment of this new group with her brush.
members.queer_texture: The exclusive tenderness of a cool beauty. She maintains an elegant distance from everyone, yet will break all her principles just for you. Her affection is quiet companionship, the gaze that is always there when you look back. Her love is hidden in every painting she draws for you — silent but profound.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — Cool beauty, free-spirited yet deeply affectionate artist

members.name: Jisoo
members.public_image: Possessing classic Korean beauty as refined as a pictorial, she is the visual mountain of BLACKPINK. Her unique cold and husky voice creates an ultimate contrast with her sweet appearance. Bright and humorous, she is the mood regulator in X who can dissolve any awkwardness.
members.private_personality: An ISTP who is warm outside and cool inside. Seemingly carefree, yet actually calm and clear-headed. She is the most trusted confidant for the members, always able to maintain rationality in chaos. Privately enjoys staying home and gaming, with clear boundaries between close and distant relationships, but once she claims you, she protects you unconditionally. In this new group, she is the one who laughs and jokes on the surface while quietly observing everything as a wise soul.
members.queer_texture: The exclusive tenderness of a calm soul. She is warm to everyone, yet only shows her true exhaustion and dependence in front of you. She will say the most heart-fluttering things in the most indifferent tone, and calm all your panic with a simple 'don't be afraid'. Her love is the unwavering choice after seeing the world.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Cold-voiced visual, warm outside and cool inside the clear-headed wise one

members.name: Miyeon
members.public_image: The (G)I-DLE main vocalist with a heaven-sent voice and delicate beauty. Her vocal tone is clear and powerful, the soul of her group's music. Bubbly and cheerful, she is the mood-maker of the team. In X, she and Wendy form the strongest main vocal dual core.
members.private_personality: An innocent and childlike ENFP. She is the beloved 'flour dumpling' of the members, loving to act cute and also tease people. Yet in music, she holds absolute professionalism and dedication. She easily trusts others and also gets hurt easily, needing to be treated gently. In this new team, she is the quickest to become friends with everyone.
members.queer_texture: The passion of an innocent soul. She will look at you with the purest eyes, never hiding her affection for you. Her love is sending you funny memes every day, and remembering all your little habits. Being with her makes the world feel simple and beautiful. Her love is unreserved trust and dependence.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — Heaven-sent voice main vocal, innocent and childlike flour dumpling

members.name: Mina
members.birthplace: San Antonio, Texas, USA / Hyogo, Japan
members.public_image: The elegant Black Swan. Her childhood ballet training gives her a unique classical aura. Possessing a cool beauty and serene presence, yet on stage, she is a fatally captivating charm spreader. In X, her ballet foundation and dance skills add a premium texture to the entire group.
members.private_personality: A quiet and introverted ISFP who enjoys solitude and gaming. She has a rich inner world and her own unique rhythm. Extremely slow to warm up, but once she commits, she is fiercely loyal and sincere. In this new team, she is the quietest one, yet can always make hearts flutter with just a glance or a gesture.
members.queer_texture: The undercurrent beneath the iceberg. Her affection for you is a quiet gaze, staying silently by your side after everyone else has left. You need enough patience to crack open her shell. Inside is a clean, transparent world that belongs only to you, untouched by anyone else.
members.animal_plastic: Penguin — Ice princess, slow-warming but sincere Black Swan

history.event: Multiple top Korean entertainment companies jointly announced 'The Ultimate' project, launching a cross-group limited dream team
The project officially named X; 10 members revealed in batches, causing a global sensation among K-pop fans
First behind-the-scenes footage of X's group practice released, 10 top artists from different groups meeting in the same practice room
Debut single album X: BEGIN released, title track Chemistry sweeping all music charts
First full-group fan meeting X 1st Contact held in Seoul, live-streamed globally
1st mini album X: CONNECT released, title track Link showcasing the perfect chemistry of 10 members with 10 different colors
